# Before sending this Pull Request 

- [ ] Grant `write` permissions to `dev-alpha` team (Settings > Collaborators and team > Add teams)
- [ ] Add the `main` branch protection rule (Settings > Branches > Add classic branch protection rule):
	- Branch name pattern - `main`
	- set checkmark at `Require a pull request before merging`
	- hit `Create`


# PR Summary:
